'''Shelbin Dang''' was the [[Plaza Director|Director]] of [[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] and [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
